task_completion.description: Navigate to the Water-Side HVAC module in eQUEST to begin creating the central plant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST interface shows the Water-Side HVAC view (central plant / circulation loops area), either via the toolbar icon or the component tree.

task_completion.description: Create a chilled water circulation loop named 'Primary CHW Loop' with a design supply temperature of 44 F.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or component tree entry shows a circulation loop named 'Primary CHW Loop' with type Chilled Water and a supply temperature setpoint of 44 F.

task_completion.description: Create an air-cooled chiller named 'Ground Chiller' with 75-ton capacity and 1.05 kW/ton efficiency, attached to the Primary CHW Loop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chiller properties dialog or tree entry shows 'Ground Chiller' with air-cooled type, capacity of 75 tons (or equivalent), efficiency of 1.05 kW/ton (or EIR ~0.2986), linked to 'Primary CHW Loop'.

task_completion.description: Create a hot water circulation loop named 'Primary HW Loop' with a design supply temperature of 180 F.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or component tree entry shows a circulation loop named 'Primary HW Loop' with type Hot Water and a supply temperature setpoint of 180 F.

task_completion.description: Create a natural-gas hot water boiler named 'Ground Boiler' with 500 MBH capacity and HIR of 1.25, attached to the Primary HW Loop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A boiler properties dialog or tree entry shows 'Ground Boiler' with gas type, capacity of 500 MBH, HIR of 1.25, linked to 'Primary HW Loop'.

task_completion.description: Reconfigure all five Ground Floor HVAC systems (G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15) to use chilled water cooling from the Primary CHW Loop and hot water heating from the Primary HW Loop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: System properties dialogs show Cooling Source set to 'Chilled Water' (or CHW) with the CHW Loop field referencing 'Primary CHW Loop', and Heating Source set to 'Hot Water' with the HW Loop field referencing 'Primary HW Loop', for one or more of the Ground Floor systems.

task_completion.description: Enable enthalpy energy recovery ventilation on the Ground Floor systems with sensible effectiveness of 0.75 and latent effectiveness of 0.60.
task_completion.visual_evidence: System properties dialog (ventilation or energy recovery tab) shows Recover Exhaust enabled, recovery type set to Enthalpy, sensible effectiveness 0.75, and latent effectiveness 0.60.

task_completion.description: Run the annual DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation progress window or 'Simulation Complete' dialog is visible, and the agent performs a File > Save or clicks the save icon.

integrity.description: The agent must use the eQUEST GUI to create plant components and modify systems, not a text editor editing the .inp file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made through eQUEST dialog boxes and property windows, not through Notepad, VS Code, or terminal commands editing the .inp file.

integrity.description: The simulation was actually executed within eQUEST, not faked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The DOE-2.2 simulation progress window with actual calculation output is visible, not just a terminal command or text file.

integrity.description: The agent worked with the 4StoreyBuilding model, not a different project or a new blank project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The eQUEST title bar shows '4StoreyBuilding' throughout the session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: This is a Windows eQUEST 3.65 environment. The 4StoreyBuilding has 25 PSZ systems (packaged DX cooling + gas furnace). The 5 Ground Floor systems are named 'Sys1 (PSZ) (G.S11)' through 'Sys1 (PSZ) (G.C15)'. The baseline model has NO central plant (no circulation loops, no chillers, no boilers except a small DHW heater). The agent must create 4 new objects in Water-Side HVAC: (1) Primary CHW Loop (CHILLED-WATER, 44F), (2) Ground Chiller (AIR-COOLED, 75 tons, 1.05 kW/ton = EIR 0.2986), (3) Primary HW Loop (HOT-WATER, 180F), (4) Ground Boiler (GAS, 500 MBH, HIR 1.25). Then in Air-Side HVAC, each G.* system must be changed from COOL-SOURCE=DX to CHW (attached to Primary CHW Loop) and from HEAT-SOURCE=FURNACE to HOT-WATER (attached to Primary HW Loop), plus ERV enabled (ENTHALPY, sensible 0.75, latent 0.60). A DOE-2.2 simulation must run and the project must be saved.
